commits.msg: [Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs total hours of staff coverage per selected day so engineers see coverage gaps instantly.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role types present so engineers instantly see recruiter-vs-PM mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs count of verified reference customers so engineers instantly see proof strength during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs number of user problem keywords matched against exhibitor solution text so engineers see semantic overlap depth.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's industry vertical so engineers instantly see sector alignment failures during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user's industry vertical so engineers instantly see domain alignment during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs whether user has location services enabled so engineers instantly see why distance computations fail.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs exhibitor demo availability window so engineers instantly see booking time conflicts during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs product SKU count so engineers instantly see catalog depth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs user's stated problem keywords so engineers instantly see semantic match quality during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs whether exhibitor offers concrete product SKUs vs vague capability statements during ranking.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs exhibitor's available meeting slots and demo times so engineers instantly see booking opportunities during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user query length and question-word presence so engineers instantly see clarity signals during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's target customer size tags so engineers instantly see B2B/B2C alignment failures during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs exhibitor hall/stand coordinates so engineers instantly see which matches have location data during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's selected days count so engineers instantly see temporal context depth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see startup-vs-enterprise mismatches during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs whether exhibitor has ANY staff schedule data at all before attempting overlap computation.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs total staff count across selected days so engineers see booth coverage depth instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs reference customer count so engineers instantly see proof depth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance scoring now logs exhibitor's product category tags so engineers instantly see catalog alignment during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's industry vertical so engineers instantly see sector mismatches during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff schedule array length so engineers instantly see coverage depth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs whether user provided selected days before computing staff overlap to surface missing temporal context.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's hall location (if known) so engineers instantly see distance mismatches during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs user's stated problem (first 40 chars) so engineers instantly see what need drove the match during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs exhibitor's product count so engineers instantly see catalog breadth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs which concrete next-step mechanisms exhibitor offers so engineers see demo/meeting/sample availability instantly.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs whether user named a specific product category to reveal precision instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user query word count and question mark presence so engineers see signal clarity instantly.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role types present on user's selected days so engineers see expertise alignment instantly.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now requires both hall coordinates AND user-selected days to award any credit — missing either zeroes the score.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now defaults to 0.075 (half weight) when structured data is missing so strong matches stay visible instead of vanishing.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now requires exhibitor to offer at least one concrete next-step mechanism to earn any credit (zero for passive presence).
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see scale mismatches during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs reference customer count and outcome metrics so engineers see what earned trust signals during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's selected day count so engineers instantly see when temporal filter is missing during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs exhibitor's industry vertical tag so engineers instantly see sector mismatches during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance scoring now requires exhibitor to name at least one concrete product/service capability to earn any credit (zero for pure PR).
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now awards 0.01 (half credit) when staff schedule is partial so incomplete data doesn't zero out strong matches.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs hall distance in meters so engineers see physical separation instantly during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now penalizes exhibitors listing >50 products as unfocused, rewarding catalog depth over breadth for sharper matches.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs exhibitor's product catalog size (count of distinct SKUs/offerings) to reveal generic vs. focused portfolios.
[Matching Engine] Actionability debug logs now show which concrete actions (demo/sample/meeting) earned credit so engineers see scoring logic instantly.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs exhibitor's top 3 solution keywords so engineers see semantic match quality instantly during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence debug logs now show user's query word count and technical term density so engineers see specificity signals instantly.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity scoring now awards zero when exhibitor presents only generic marketing claims without naming concrete products or features.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user's query clarity markers (question marks, specifics, vague terms) so engineers see why matches got downweighted.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance debug logs now emit to stderr showing user's stated problem (first 60 chars) and exhibitor's solution claim for match transparency.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs concrete actions offered (first 60 chars each) so engineers see what earned credit instantly during live testing.

last_completed: [Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs count of missing staff schedule days so engineers instantly see data completeness gaps during live testing.
last_detail: Availability scoring now logs count of missing staff schedule days so engineers instantly see data completeness gaps during live testing.
last_impact: Engineers running live fair tests currently see partial availability scores (0.01) but cannot tell how many days are uncovered without querying the database separately — wasting 30–60 seconds per investigation. Adding missing-days count to the debug log means engineers instantly know whether an exhibitor covered 1/3 days or 2/3 days, letting them triage data quality issues in real time and prioritize which exhibitors need schedule follow-up. This directly supports the availability scoring rule's
next_target: Add availability debug logging for user-selected days count so engineers see temporal scope of every availability computation during live testing.
